creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
Mon, Sep 12, 2011 at 12:06:01AM +0400, Ruslan Mahmatkhanov wrote:
> Eygene, i'm terribly sorry about that, but i'm not able to reproduce
> that on 7.4 (with 9.0 and 9.1 pgsql versions), nor on 8.2 anymore.
> Something changed in that cruel world.

I wonder what ;))

> There is still low probability, that this particular build breakages
> were triggered by fixed databases/postgresql-plpython build, but
> it's doubtful.

Since plpython's fix touches only configure script in the place
where the threaded Python error is produces, I doubt it too.

> Please close this pr for now, i'll reopen it if i would be able
> reproduce this in future. Sorry again.

No problems, I'll close this PR.  One hint: it is always good
to keep the logs of the failed stuff, just to keep trace of
what is going on.

Thanks!
--
